rows.finding: The TETC route needs a system-level DPTC simulator rather than ADC-only accounting.
rows.evidence_checked: architecture summary, design-space sweep, pessimistic gate
rows.resolution: pass: G3 uses system PPA terms and keeps a pessimistic EDP margin versus Lightening DPTC.

rows.finding: ADC, RTL, and PHY artifacts must remain calibration or boundary evidence.
rows.evidence_checked: parameter table, calibration manuscript table, claim-boundary scan
rows.resolution: pass: manuscript and gate label circuit-facing artifacts as calibration/proxy/boundary evidence.
rows.promotion_effect: prevents circuit or device signoff overclaim

rows.finding: Public repro must include the new TETC artifacts without private data, weights, or personal paths.
rows.evidence_checked: public repro manifest, generated package validator
rows.resolution: pass when manifest alignment and generated public-repro validation both pass.

rows.finding: SUDS must not be presented as beating every local selector or alternate photonic fabric.
rows.resolution: pass: signal/L1/HyAtten/TeMPO/ASTRA wins are retained as boundary context.
rows.promotion_effect: keeps the contribution as scheduler-derived budget composition
